plan_review_notes: Approved the envelope-recording slice. The scope is narrow and sequenced correctly after the gate evaluator: record current decision state from existing hard-state inputs without adding policy derivation or surface integrations.

plan_review_history.notes: Revised the generic scaffold into a concrete envelope-recording slice: convert promotion-gate results plus follow-up request, receipt, and verification artifacts into reconstructable promotion or invalidation records. Preserve decision status, blocker detail, evidence refs, and follow-up task linkage, but keep event-bus publication and invalidation-policy derivation out of scope.

Approved the envelope-recording slice. The scope is narrow and sequenced correctly after the gate evaluator: record current decision state from existing hard-state inputs without adding policy derivation or surface integrations.

spec_review_notes: Freeze scope to promotion/invalidation envelope recording only. The implementation may extend current record types enough to preserve candidate identity, blocker detail, evidence refs, and follow-up task linkage. It must not add event-bus publication, invalidation-matrix logic, or new CLI/MCP surfaces.

normal_cases.name: A promotion-eligible gate result records a stable promotion decision artifact with decision metadata, claim, evidence refs, and follow-up task linkage.
A blocked gate result records a stable invalidation-style record that preserves blocker detail and the affected artifacts.

edge_cases.name: Evidence refs from follow-up request, execution receipts, and verification artifacts remain deduped and stable in the recorded envelope.
Recorded envelopes keep the original evolution run and candidate identity even when multiple blocker conditions are present.

exception_cases.name: Missing gate outputs or missing follow-up lineage fails loudly instead of writing a partial or misleading decision envelope.
Unsupported decision status fails with an actionable error instead of silently coercing to promotion or invalidation.

verification_methods.target: A promotion-eligible gate result records a stable promotion decision artifact with decision metadata, claim, evidence refs, and follow-up task linkage.
